name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- ScriptApplyEdits structured previews now align inserted and deleted lines before rendering their unified diff.
- Replacing a one-line method with a multi-line body no longer makes every following method appear removed and re-added.
- Unified preview output is grouped into compact hunks with bounded context and response size.
- Large scripts use bounded line alignment instead of allocating an unbounded LCS matrix.
- MCP regression covers normal and unindented following methods, strict Preview no-write/SHA behavior, actual apply, and mixed replace_method plus anchor_insert plus insert_method calls.

### Previous Changes

- VersionControl supports single and multi-asset inspection, editability, and checkout workflows with per-asset diagnostics.
- ScriptApplyEdits Preview is strictly no-write for structured and anchor operations and returns diff/SHA evidence.
- ManageUI SetGraphic applies and verifies TextMeshProUGUI text and font settings in Prefab Stage while preserving Unicode.
- ManageUI creation actions resolve explicit parents inside the current Prefab Stage and create objects in the stage scene.
